notes: k-bit quantization library for PyTorch underpinning 8-bit optimizers, LLM.int8() and 4-bit/NF4 QLoRA. Written as one lowercase token but spoken as three words: BITS-and-BYTES ‚Äî STRESS on first and last, middle 'and' reduced to schwa. The spelling is the pronunciation; only the concatenation obscures the word boundaries.
